index.lead_text_1: After the registration you will get our free guide <mark class='text-secondary'>«10 Crypto Trading Mistakes to Avoid»</mark>. It’s filled with simple tips by our best experienced analytics to save you from common mistakes.
index.lead_text_2: Just enter your data on signup, and we’ll send it straight to your inbox. Many {country_name} traders started with this guide and say it was extremely helpful for building confidence in their first trades.
index.lead_label: The market is not waiting — start today!
